blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Reddit locals' favorite Brooklyn comedy club. 4.9 stars (244 reviews). 130+ comics in rotation, never the same show twice. Walk-in friendly. Right in Bushwick — perfect for the trip corridor. $13-15 tickets. HIGH locality: multiple Reddit threads name this as THE spot.
